caption:
Save this for your next romantic activity! 💕

Costa Azzurra is a unique and relaxing boating experience in Dubai. It is a self-drive electric catamaran for two; a perfect activity for couples! 👫🏻

💰 for 2 persons:
* 200 AED for 15 minutes 
* 350 AED for 30 minutes 

📍 The Pointe, Palm Jumeirah

Who will you bring here? Tag your date in the comment. 💕
